---
title: "Analyse_Releves_PP"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-29"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Import librairies
```{r}
#importation tidyverse

library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

library(ggsignif)


```

## Import données

```{r}
Tidy_Releves_PP <- read_csv("Data/Tidy_Releves_PP.csv")
View(Tidy_Releves_PP)
```

## 1ère Visualisation

```{r}

modele <- lm(Tidy_Releves_PP$DetectionLynx~Tidy_Releves_PP$TypePiege)
summary(modele)

ggplot(data=Tidy_Releves_PP, aes(x=TypePiege, y = DetectionLynx/nrow(Tidy_Releves_PP)))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity")

```
